subject: fix(icons): automate public dir sync in generate-icons script
body:
The dashboard/public/assets/images/ directory contained manual copies
of generated icons that could drift between regenerations. The script
now copies all generated files (7 PNGs + favicon.ico) to the Vite
public dir automatically, ensuring manifest paths and favicon links
always resolve to current output.

Removes the icon sync backlog item from TODO.md — fully resolved.

Tags: icons, build, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
